description: Octave Intelligence plc provides various software solutions. Its solutions helps organizations to better understand and manage the environments in which they design, build, operate, and protect their assets, people, and critical infrastructure. Its platform connects data, events, and workflows across various environments and applies context-aware intelligence to help customers understand what is happening, what may happen next, and how actions in one area affect conditions in another.
